caption: A group of men in professional attire, including suits and traditional Indian wear, are gathered in a crowded indoor setting. The central figure is an older man wearing a light-colored shirt and a brown shawl, who is speaking and gesturing with his hands. Several other men stand behind and beside him, observing the scene. A microphone with an "ANI" logo is positioned in front of the central speaker. The screen is overlaid with news graphics, including the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo and a red ticker at the bottom stating "BJP से डॉ. प्रेम कुमार नीतीश सरकार में मंत्री बने". A top banner reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". Small profile images of officials and their names, such as "सुब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", and "विजेन्द्र यादव", appear on the sides. As the sequence progresses, the central man continues to speak, subtly shifting his posture and hand movements while the others remain relatively still.
